title: CyberOrgans
description: This mod adds five human cyber organs and a tablet with information about the effects they have on the player. The organs themselves make the player stronger, faster and tougher.
body:
What items do (spoiler):

- Leg: Passively applies the Resistance effect. When [PCM] is pressed, it throws the character several blocks up.
  
- Lungs: Passively applies the “Speed” effect and also allows you to breathe underwater. When [PCM] is pressed, they release air, dealing damage to nearby mobs.

- Heart: Passively applies the “Regeneration” effect. Pressing [PCM] activates a level 3 Regeneration effect for 5 seconds.

- Hand: Passively applies the effects “Resistance” and “Haste”. It has a 10% chance to deal 100 damage on impact.

- Eye: Passively applies the “Night Vision” effect. Press [PCM] to highlight nearby entities. Tablet - Shows how many organs have been harvested.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
